config.title: Settings
config.engine_fz_desc: Uses PowerToys FancyZones engine. Requires PowerToys to be installed.
config.engine_cze_desc: Uses our optimized native engine for better integration and performance.
config.fz_manage_desc: Configure layouts per monitor and desktop
config.pip_label: Pin Picture-in-Picture windows to all desktops
config.config_path_help: Configuration is saved in this folder. You can move it to an external drive for portability.

app_list.restore_desc: Open all applications in the workspace
app_list.clean_desc: Close open windows for this workspace
app_list.conflicts_desc: Click to sync and adapt to current environment

modals.confirm_delete_app_msg: Are you sure you want to remove "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
modals.confirm_delete_ws_msg: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the workspace "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
modals.delete_layout_msg: Are you sure you want to permanently delete the layout "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
modals.sync_conflict_intro: Inconsistencies detected between saved config and current environment
modals.sync_portability_msg: This workspace contains layouts that don't exist on this machine. They will be automatically imported.
modals.sync_fz_info: This process will inject the necessary parameters into the PowerToys registry.
modals.sync_cze_info: This process will adapt the native engine to the current monitor resolution.
modals.solution_monitor: The application will be reassigned to the nearest detected or primary monitor.
modals.solution_layout: Layout "{{name}}" will be activated on this monitor and desktop.
modals.solution_desktop: Missing virtual desktops will be created automatically when launching.
modals.solution_fz_create: The missing layout will be created and injected into FancyZones.
modals.solution_cze_assign: The configured native layout will be applied to this monitor.
modals.sync_portability_details: The original layout was created for a different resolution. The system will proportionally scale the zones to fit the current monitor without losing structure.

item_dialog.default_layout_warning: Layout "{{name}}" detected, but it's a default template.
item_dialog.preview_not_available: Preview not available for this layout type
item_dialog.active_layout_missing_on_pc: This layout exists in the workspace but is not on this PC.
item_dialog.template_notice: You are using a standard template. For full control, create a "Custom Layout" in FancyZones.
item_dialog.no_layout_for_env: No active layout for this monitor and desktop.
item_dialog.open_editor_hint: Use {{shortcut}} to open the Manager and assign one.

types.url_desc: Open a website in your favorite browser.
types.ide_desc: Open a folder in VS Code, Cursor, etc.
types.vscode_desc: Quick access to Visual Studio Code.
types.obsidian_desc: Open a specific vault in Obsidian.

zone_editor.title: Zone Manager
zone_editor.no_custom_layouts_hint: Create a new one or duplicate a template to get started

clean_modal.title: Clean Workspace: {{category}}
clean_modal.intro: The following open windows belonging to this workspace have been detected. Select the ones you want to close.
clean_modal.empty: No open windows detected for this workspace.

error_boundary.title: Critical error in Zone Editor
error_boundary.message: The interface has failed due to an unexpected error. Please report this error.
